nasb.text: He shall put the incense on the fire before the Lord, that the cloud of incense may cover the mercy seat that is on the ark of the testimony, otherwise he will die.

esv.text: and put the incense on the fire before the Lord, that the cloud of the incense may cover the mercy seat that is over the testimony, so that he does not die.

cnv.text: 在耶和華面前把香放在火上，使香的煙雲遮掩約櫃上的施恩座，免得他死亡。

ccb.text: 他要在耶和华面前烧香，使香的烟笼罩约柜上的施恩座，免得他死亡。
